rules.label: 23.A.
rules.html: If an infraction is committed and not called, the <dfn data-rule="3.Q.10">player</dfn> committing the infraction should inform the infracted player or team of the infraction.
rules.text: If an infraction is committed and not called, the player committing the infraction should inform the infracted player or team of the infraction.

rules.label: 23.B.
rules.html: On a <dfn data-rule="3.M">stoppage of play</dfn>, if it is ever unclear which of a team’s members are the current players or where they are on or off the field, they should identify themselves when the opposing team requests.
rules.text: On a stoppage of play, if it is ever unclear which of a team’s members are the current players or where they are on or off the field, they should identify themselves when the opposing team requests.

rules.label: 23.C.
rules.html: If a dispute arises on the field, play stops and is restarted with a check when the matter is resolved.
rules.text: If a dispute arises on the field, play stops and is restarted with a check when the matter is resolved.

rules.label: 23.D.
rules.html: If a novice <dfn data-rule="3.Q.10">player</dfn> commits an infraction out of sincere ignorance of the rules, it should be common practice to stop play and explain the infraction.
rules.text: If a novice player commits an infraction out of sincere ignorance of the rules, it should be common practice to stop play and explain the infraction.

rules.label: 23.E.
rules.html: In addition to the assumption that players will not intentionally violate the rules, players are similarly expected to make every effort to avoid violating them.
rules.text: In addition to the assumption that players will not intentionally violate the rules, players are similarly expected to make every effort to avoid violating them.
